hints.text: British overseas territory (counts as UK); drives on the **left**; black SV car w/ its front sides visible
Plates **all-white**, fairly long, black digits bunched in the **middle**
Roads have a single **solid yellow centre line, no outer lines**; occasional white **zig-zag** markings
Single-family **stone houses in pastel colours w/ bright white roofs** (rainwater catchment)
Dense small trees & bushes, lots of **palms**; you're never far from the distinctly **light-blue** ocean
**Hamilton** = by far the largest town (dense multi-floor downtown); NW tip has big **unpainted grey-brick** buildings (dockyard)
